column1: # Claude Code plugins to ensure installed. One per line:
# Whitespace-separated; # comments allowed. The marketplace source may be a
# GitHub owner/repo, a full git URL (e.g. Gitea), or a local path.
# Add a line + `chezmoi apply` to install it everywhere. Sync with `claude plugin update`.
# GitHub marketplaces add directly by owner/repo. The private Gitea one is a
# LOCAL PATH (chezmoi external clones it to ~/.config/claude-marketplaces/).
